mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_REPLY ( REPLY_ID, BOARD_ID, USER_ID, PARENT_REPLY_ID, CONTENT, REG_DATE, IS_ACTIVE, LIKE_CNT ) VALUES ( REPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{board_id}, #{user_id}, #{parent_reply_id, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', 0 )
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, NVL(u.nickname, u.username) AS writer_name, u.profile_filename FROM TBL_REPLY r LEFT JOIN TBL_USER u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.parent_reply_id = #{parent_reply_id} ORDER BY r.reg_date ASC
